top_signals.title: Alphabet $80 Billion Equity Sale Set to Break Fundraising Record
top_signals.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s surprise $80 billion sale of equity to fund spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure is expected to become the biggest equity capital markets transaction of all time, according to data compiled by Bloomberg.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump signs watered-down AI vetting order after Maga infighting
top_signals.summary: President’s executive order will allow the US government to gain early access to cutting-edge models
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump appoints real estate heir Bill Pulte as national intelligence chief
top_signals.summary: Housing industry executive and staunch ally of the president to take up role in acting capacity

top_signals.title: Google fixes one actively exploited Android zero-day, 124 flaws
top_signals.summary: Google has released the June 2026 Android security patches to address 124 vulnerabilities, including one zero-day flaw exploited in targeted attacks. [...]
